properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Heaven is wide open I can see in there The Son of God is standing For His people everywhere Lift up your eyes Our hope is alive

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: King of all the universe We declare Your matchless worth You reign, You reign Sin has lost its hold on me Death has no more victory You reign, You reign

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Everywhere Your glory Is shining in the dark Every corner of creation Speaks of who You are How great is Your name So worthy of our praise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hallelujah, Hallelujah Hallelujah You reign Hallelujah, Hallelujah Hallelujah You reign

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: King of all the universe We declare Your matchless worth You reign, You reign Sin has lost its hold on me Death has no more victory You reign, You reign Oh yeah, You reign
